message:
fix: Resolve flaky tests with comprehensive table cleanup and serial execution

- Add all 70+ table names to beforeEach cleanup list to prevent collisions
- Rename duplicate math_test table to math_ext in arithmetic operators test
- Fix unsafe JSON.parse in REGEXP_SPLIT test with try-catch fallback
- Set Playwright to serial execution (workers: 1) since tests share WASM state
- Add text-based NEAR search fallback and fix GROUP BY empty result crash

232 tests now pass consistently with 3 intentionally skipped (model deps).

files.patch:
@@ -3,10 +3,10 @@ import { defineConfig, devices } from '@playwright/test';
 
 export default defineConfig({
   testDir: './tests/e2e',
-  fullyParallel: true,
+  fullyParallel: false,
   forbidOnly: !!process.env.CI,
   retries: process.env.CI ? 2 : 0,
-  workers: process.env.CI ? 1 : undefined,
+  workers: 1, // Tests share WASM state - must run serially
   reporter: 'html',
   use: {
     baseURL: 'http://localhost:3000',
